scan_instruction_4: The text should be clear and readable
allergy_instruction: Select all that apply. We will warn you if any product contains these ingredients.
choose_perfect_plan: Choose the perfect plan for your needs
review_plan_payment: Review your plan and select a payment method
scan_to_see_here: Scan a product to see it here!
faq_q1: How accurate is the ingredient analysis?
faq_a1: Our analysis uses a comprehensive database of ingredients and their potential health impacts. However, always consult a medical professional.
faq_q2: Can I scan products in any language?
faq_a2: Currently, Fro-vy supports ingredient labels in English. We are working on adding support for Sinhala and Tamil in upcoming updates.
faq_q3: How do I update my health profile?
faq_a3: You can update your allergies and medical conditions anytime from your Account Details page.
faq_a4: Absolutely. Your health information is encrypted and never shared with third parties. You can request data deletion at any time.

delete_account_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your data including scan history, health profile, and preferences. This action cannot be undone.
